text:
(4) The officer's duties referred to in paragraph (1) must be exercised in accordance with Practice Direction 16A.

### CHAPTER 14 E+W ENFORCEMENT ORDERS AND FINANCIAL COMPENSATION ORDERS: PERSONS NOTIFIED
